# BuddyMoney

BuddyMoney is a beginner-friendly personal finance website that helps people budget, save money, understand debt, compare credit card topics, and make smarter financial decisions.

Website:
https://www.buddymoney.com

## Main Sections

Home:
https://www.buddymoney.com

Money Tools:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools

Budget Coach:
https://www.buddymoney.com/coach

Mortgage Payoff Calculator:
https://www.buddymoney.com/mortgage

Credit Cards Hub:
https://www.buddymoney.com/credit-cards

Blog and Guides:
https://www.buddymoney.com/blog

## Key Tools

Monthly Payment Calculator:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/monthly-payment-calculator

Emergency Fund Estimator:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/emergency-fund

Debt Payoff Planner:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/debt-payoff

Budget Tracker:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/budget-tracker

Bill Splitter:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/bill-splitter

Credit Card Finder:
https://www.buddymoney.com/tools/credit-cards

## Main Topics

BuddyMoney covers:
- Budgeting
- Saving money
- Emergency funds
- Debt payoff
- Credit cards
- Secured credit cards
- Credit rebuilding
- Mortgage payoff strategies
- Beginner personal finance education

## Audience

BuddyMoney is designed for beginners who want simple explanations, free tools, and practical steps to improve their money situation.

## Editorial Notes

BuddyMoney content is educational and informational. It is not personalized financial, legal, or tax advice.

Important pages for trust and transparency:
https://www.buddymoney.com/privacy
https://www.buddymoney.com/terms
https://www.buddymoney.com/affiliate-disclosure
